slice: Pair a listener-reported audible outcome with the browser pulse and render observations generated by the existing iPhone Safari diagnostic.

behavior.trigger: A successful Test sound pulse reveals a Yes/No confirmation panel after 520 ms.
behavior.privacy: Session-local browser evidence only; no network transmission or persistent storage added.

verification.method: isolated Node execution of byte-equivalent pure evidence-builder logic
assertions: heard outcome preserves pulse and render evidence
not-heard outcome remains distinguishable from browser render state
verification.reason: The execution environment could not resolve github.com for a fresh checkout.

deployment.public_probe: No searchable deployment identity was found for mirror-cartographer-ui.vercel.app during this run.

limits: A listener response is subjective evidence, not a device-level acoustic measurement.
A render-confirmed browser result does not prove physical speaker output.
No live iPhone result is claimed until the deployed commit and paired evidence object are observed.
